ns0:entry.ns0:title: AIDotNet/OpenDeepWiki
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AIDotNet/OpenDeepWiki
Language: c%23
OpenDeepWiki is the open-source version of the DeepWiki project, aiming to provide a powerful knowledge management and collaboration platform. The project is mainly developed using C# and TypeScript, supporting modular design, and is easy to expand and customize.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: App-vNext/Polly
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/App-vNext/Polly
Language: c%23
Polly is a .NET resilience and transient-fault-handling library that allows developers to express policies such as Retry, Circuit Breaker, Timeout, Bulkhead Isolation, and Fallback in a fluent and thread-safe manner. From version 6.0.1, Polly targets .NET Standard 1.1 and 2.0+.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: AvaloniaUI/Avalonia
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AvaloniaUI/Avalonia
Language: c%23
Develop Desktop, Embedded, Mobile and WebAssembly apps with C# and XAML. The most popular .NET UI client technology

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Azure/azure-functions-durable-extension
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Azure/azure-functions-durable-extension
Language: c%23
Durable Task Framework extension for Azure Functions

ns0:entry.ns0:title: DataDog/dd-trace-dotnet
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-dotnet
Language: c%23
.NET Client Library for Datadog APM

ns0:entry.ns0:title: IvanMurzak/Unity-MCP
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/IvanMurzak/Unity-MCP
Language: c%23
AI-powered bridge connecting LLMs and advanced AI agents to the Unity Editor via the Model Context Protocol (MCP). Chat with AI to generate code, debug errors, and automate game development tasks directly within your project.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Justsenger/ExHyperV
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Justsenger/ExHyperV
Language: c%23
The Excalibur of Hyper-V / Hyper-V 神器

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Klocman/Bulk-Crap-Uninstaller
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Klocman/Bulk-Crap-Uninstaller
Language: c%23
Remove large amounts of unwanted applications quickly.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MudBlazor/MudBlazor
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MudBlazor/MudBlazor
Language: c%23
Blazor Component Library based on Material Design principles with an emphasis on ease of use and extensibility

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Taiizor/Sucrose
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Taiizor/Sucrose
Language: c%23
Sucrose is a versatile wallpaper engine that brings life to your desktop with a wide range of interactive wallpapers.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: TechnitiumSoftware/DnsServer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/TechnitiumSoftware/DnsServer
Language: c%23
Technitium DNS Server

ns0:entry.ns0:title: YSGStudyHards/DotNetGuide
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/YSGStudyHards/DotNetGuide
Language: c%23
🌈【C#/.NET/.NET Core学习、工作、面试指南】记录、收集和总结C#/.NET/.NET Core基础知识、学习路线、开发实战、编程技巧练习、学习视频、文章、书籍、项目框架、社区组织、开发必备工具、技术前沿周刊、常见面试题、面试须知、简历模板、人才招聘、以及自己在学习和工作中的一些微薄见解。希望能和大家一起学习，共同进步。如果本知识库能为您提供帮助，别忘了给予支持哦(关注、点赞、分享)💖。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: abpframework/abp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/abpframework/abp
Language: c%23
Open-source web application framework for ASP.NET Core! Offers an opinionated architecture to build enterprise software solutions with best practices on top of the .NET. Provides the fundamental infrastructure, cross-cutting-concern implementations, startup templates, application modules, UI themes, tooling and documentation.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/aspnetcore
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/aspnetcore
Language: c%23
ASP.NET Core is a cross-platform .NET framework for building modern cloud-based web applications on Windows, Mac, or Linux.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/efcore
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/efcore
Language: c%23
EF Core is a modern object-database mapper for .NET. It supports LINQ queries, change tracking, updates, and schema migrations.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/runtime
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/runtime
Language: c%23
.NET is a cross-platform runtime for cloud, mobile, desktop, and IoT apps.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: git-ecosystem/git-credential-manager
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/git-ecosystem/git-credential-manager
Language: c%23
Secure, cross-platform Git credential storage with authentication to GitHub, Azure Repos, and other popular Git hosting services.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: huiyadanli/RevokeMsgPatcher
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/huiyadanli/RevokeMsgPatcher
Language: c%23
A hex editor for WeChat/QQ/TIM - PC版微信/QQ/TIM防撤回补丁（我已经看到了，撤回也没用了）

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/mcp
Language: c%23
Catalog of official Microsoft MCP (Model Context Protocol) server implementations for AI-powered data access and tool integration

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/semantic-kernel
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/semantic-kernel
Language: c%23
Integrate cutting-edge LLM technology quickly and easily into your apps

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mob-sakai/UIEffect
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mob-sakai/UIEffect
Language: c%23
UIEffect is an open-source package that allows you to intuitively apply rich UI effects directly from the Inspector or via code. Combine various filters, such as grayscale, blur, and dissolve, to decorate your UI with a unique visual style!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nopSolutions/nopCommerce
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nopSolutions/nopCommerce
Language: c%23
ASP.NET Core eCommerce software. nopCommerce is a free and open-source shopping cart.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: umbraco/Umbraco-CMS
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/umbraco/Umbraco-CMS
Language: c%23
Umbraco is a free and open source .NET content management system helping you deliver delightful digital experiences.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: unoplatform/uno
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/unoplatform/uno
Language: c%23
Open-source platform for building cross-platform native Mobile, Web, Desktop and Embedded apps quickly. Create rich, C#/XAML, single-codebase apps from any IDE. Hot Reload included! 90m+ NuGet Downloads!!
